package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct: `fmt.Sprintf("%+v", user)` or `fmt.Printf("%v", config)` on structs that contain password/secret/token fields
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
type Rule711PositiveRecord struct { Password string; Token string }

func scenario711Positive(user Rule711PositiveRecord) string {
	return fmt.Sprintf("%+v", user)
}
